name: The Island of Normal Sized Insects - RPG (The Island of Giant Insects)
description:
All Characters are 18+

This RPG is a parody of "The Island of Giant Insects" also called (巨蟲列島 / Kyochu Retto). It's an alternative Universe where the plane crash never happened and where the insects never became gigantic. The story is like a sort of school trip without the gore and death
creator: ~Dr-Insane~
